selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026
4,580
Total Hours
10
Features
GRC
Requester

Strategic Case
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across all delivery teams.
02
Critical Platform Upgrades
Implements Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure, supported, and performant for current and future jurisdictions.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces a dedicated Config Items Management tool for safely packaging and migrating configurations across environments without manual risk.
Key Features
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture with improved separation of concerns, enhanced testability, and reduced coupling.
In Design 1,200h
Java 25 Upgrade
Migrate codebase to Java 25 to leverage virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for high-volume tax operations.
In Progress 640h
Spring Boot 4.x Migration
Upgrade to Spring Boot 4.x with enhanced observability, native compilation support, improved dependency management, and critical security patches.
In Progress 480h
Oracle 26ai Database Migration
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered query optimisation, advanced analytics, and improved performance for high-volume tax transaction processing.
To Do 420h
Cross-Team UI Tech Debt
Systematic UI improvements and technical debt reduction spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams for long-term platform sustainability.
In Progress 220h
Config Items Management Tool
Dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across development, staging, and production without manual intervention.
In Design 380h
Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany

agenticCustomInput:
An instance for each initiative found under "CORE SUPPORTING CAPABILITIES": 
BATCH PROCESSING ENHANCEMENTS
CASE MANAGEMENT
CONTACT MANAGEMENT
CONTENT MANAGEMENT INTEGRATION
DOCUMENT MANAGEMENT INTEGRATION
FORM PROCESSING
OPERATIONAL REPORTING
REFERENCE DATA
UI CONFIGURATION
agenticJsonResponse:
{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
BATCH PROCESSING ENHANCEMENTS
CORE SUPPORTING CAPABILITIES
738.5
Total Hours
3
Features
Other, GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Modernise Legacy Batch Infrastructure
Migration of remaining batch jobs from SCDF to Amplio engine reduces technical debt, improves system resilience, and eliminates manual intervention requirements across revenue management operations.
02
Enhance Batch System Maintainability
Standardising project structure, centralising duplicated configurations, and resolving artifact naming conflicts reduces long-term maintenance burden and improves code quality across batch processing layers.
03
Enable Scalable Batch Processing
Amplio batch improvements and maintenance enhancements support high-volume transaction processing, ensuring system stability during peak periods and campaign-driven mass-processing scenarios.
Key Features
Amplio batch - Replacement of SCDF with Amplio (Part 2)
Migrate remaining P1 batch jobs to Amplio Batch engine, including overpayment-process, direct-deposit, and object-access-group-initialization with full deprecation of SCDF.
In Progress 494.9h
Amplio Batch - improvements and maintenance part 2
Standardise project structure, centralise configurations, resolve artifact naming conflicts, and clean up redundant POM dependencies across Amplio batch processing system.
Waiting Analysis Approval 243.6h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Case Management
Core Supporting Capabilities
84
Total Hours
2
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enable Intelligent Case Worker Assignment
Capability to assign case workers based on availability, skills, and organisational unit membership ensures optimal resource allocation and improves case completion rates across revenue authority operations.
02
Support Availability-Based Profiling
Case worker profile configuration using availability criteria enables administrators to define matching rules that automatically identify suitable candidates, reducing manual assignment overhead and improving case outcomes.
03
Enhance Case Effort Visibility
Automatic effort calculation based on resource calendars and expected allocation provides transparency on case workload, enabling better capacity planning and resource management across case management teams.
Key Features
Add and Maintain Case - Assign and Unassign Case Workers - Effort - User
Enable revenue officials to assign case workers based on availability, skills, and organisational unit, with automatic effort calculation from resource calendars and expected allocation.
Waiting Analysis Approval 42h
Define and Maintain Case Type - Case Worker Profiles - Use Availability - Admin
Allow administrators to define case worker profiles using availability criteria, enabling system to automatically match suitable workers to cases based on configured matching rules.
Waiting Analysis Approval 42h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Contact Management
Core Supporting Capabilities · Solon Tax 2026
882.7
Total Hours
3
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Ensure Legal Document Compliance
Automatic assignment of unique registration numbers to incoming and outgoing documents ensures compliance with legal requirements for document identification, enabling audit trails and regulatory reporting across all document types.
02
Enable Multi-Recipient Communication
Capability to send outbound messages to multiple recipients simultaneously with template-based content variation ensures consistent communication with taxpayers, representatives, and agents while reducing manual effort.
03
Support Flexible Contact Distribution
Admin-configurable rules for recipient selection and message generation enable organisations to define complex communication workflows, supporting diverse business scenarios without code changes.
Key Features
Assign Unique Number to Incoming and Outgoing Documents
Enable administrators to define rules generating unique reference IDs for documents with configurable formatting, supporting legal compliance and document identification requirements.
HLD 709.1h
Send Outbound Message Manually to Multiple Recipients - User
Allow revenue officials to send outbound messages to multiple recipients with file upload support, manual selection, and template-based content variation per recipient type.
Waiting Analysis Approval 79.2h
Define and Maintain Contact Types - Select Recipients - Admin
Enable administrators to define rules determining which recipient types receive copies of outbound messages under specific circumstances with dynamic recipient selection logic.
Waiting Analysis Approval 42h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Content Management Integration
Core Supporting Capabilities
80
Total Hours
1
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Productise Self-Service CMS Integration
Generic CMS integration capability enables self-service portals to deliver dynamic content without platform-specific dependencies, supporting multiple implementations and reducing customisation effort.
02
Enable Content Flexibility
Integration with content management systems allows organisations to manage portal content independently, reducing development cycles and enabling rapid content updates without system deployments.
03
Support Multi-Implementation Approach
Productised CMS integration removes Drupal-specific constraints, enabling broader adoption across implementations with different content management preferences and infrastructure requirements.
Key Features
SS Enhancements - CMS Integration
Productise generic CMS integration for self-service portals, removing Drupal-specific dependencies and enabling flexible content management across multiple implementations.
To Do 80h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Document Management Integration
Core Supporting Capabilities · Solon Tax 2026
2,090.9
Total Hours
3
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enable Digital Signature Validation
Capability to validate digital signatures on attachments ensures document authenticity and compliance with electronic signature regulations, protecting revenue authority from fraudulent submissions.
02
Support System-Generated Document Signing
Automatic digital signing of system-generated documents by BPMN processes enables secure distribution of official documents with embedded signatures, supporting regulatory compliance and audit requirements.
03
Enhance Document Security Framework
Comprehensive document management integration with signature validation and system signing capabilities provides foundation for secure document exchange with taxpayers and external stakeholders.
Key Features
Digital Signatures - System digital signing of PDF documents generated by bpmn process
Enable system to digitally sign PDF documents generated by BPMN processes with configurable certificates, visual signature stamps, and audit logging for secure document distribution.
In Design 1,344h
Digital Signatures - Validate signatures in attachments RM & SS/ Reference Implementation
Enable users to validate digital signatures on attached documents with trusted provider configuration, visual signature indicators, and verification status display in forms and entities.
In Design 746.9h
Attachments in Forms - Document Uploads enhancements before and after saving the form / RM & SS
Allow users to upload and manage attachments while filling forms before saving, with metadata editing, removal capability, and audit logging of attachment modifications.
In Design 739.2h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
FORM PROCESSING
CORE SUPPORTING CAPABILITIES
373.1
Total Hours
1
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enhance Form Metadata Tracking
Recording form creator and submitter details enables audit trails distinguishing between form originators and submitters, supporting compliance requirements and improving accountability in form processing workflows.
02
Enable Form Data Extensibility
User-defined characteristics for forms allow organisations to capture additional metadata without code changes, supporting diverse implementation requirements and reducing customisation effort.
03
Support Form Audit Requirements
Comprehensive form metadata including external system timestamps and user-defined fields enables complete audit trails for regulatory compliance and investigation purposes.
Key Features
Forms : Be able to log details for the submitter of the form /RM &SS
Enable recording of form creator and submitter details as Party Role references, external system timestamps, and user-defined characteristics for comprehensive form audit trails.
In Design 373.1h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Operational Reporting
Core Supporting Capabilities
72
Total Hours
1
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Automate Report Distribution Workflows
Scheduled operational report generation with automatic distribution to recipient lists eliminates manual report delivery, ensuring timely information dissemination to stakeholders and reducing administrative overhead.
02
Enable Flexible Report Scheduling
Batch process integration with configurable parameters enables organisations to schedule reports with specific criteria, supporting diverse reporting requirements without custom development.
03
Support Operational Efficiency
Automated report distribution to multiple recipients via email ensures consistent information flow to decision-makers, improving operational visibility and enabling faster response to business events.
Key Features
Automatically distribute Operational Report in list of recipients
Enable administrators to generate operational reports with specific parameters and automatically schedule distribution to configured recipient lists via email.
Under Analysis 72h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
REFERENCE DATA
CORE SUPPORTING CAPABILITIES · Solon Tax 2026
606.9
Total Hours
3
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enable Code List Import/Export Capability
Structured import and export of code lists with validation enables organisations to manage reference data externally, supporting data migration, integration with external systems, and bulk updates.
02
Support EU Tax Code Evolution
Enhanced code list flexibility allowing same code with different descriptions across validity periods ensures compliance with EU tax code updates like NACE Rev. 2.1 harmonisation requirements.
03
Improve Reference Data Visibility
Display and search capabilities for source and timestamp columns enable users to track reference data provenance and modifications, supporting audit requirements and data quality management.
Key Features
Enhance codelist items codes flexibility and historical track in Solon Tax
Enable code list items to have same code with different descriptions across non-overlapping validity periods, supporting EU tax code evolution and historical accuracy requirements.
In Design 522.9h
Import Code Lists - Admin
Enable administrators to upload structured code list files with validation, supporting addition of new code lists, items, and updates to existing configurations without deletion capability.
Waiting Analysis Approval 42h
Export Code List
Enable administrators to download code list information with related items in structured formats with language selection, supporting external editing and integration with other tools.
Waiting Analysis Approval 42h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
UI CONFIGURATION
CORE SUPPORTING CAPABILITIES · Solon Tax 2026
414.7
Total Hours
6
Features
GRC, Other
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enhance User Interface Configurability
Configurable home page widgets, field visibility indicators, and form prefilling logic enable organisations to customise user experience without code changes, supporting diverse implementation requirements.
02
Improve Form User Experience
Automatic text capitalisation, field prefilling based on related values, and visual required field indicators reduce user errors and improve data entry efficiency across form-based workflows.
03
Enable Flexible UI Customisation
Support for custom object field labels, alternative filter positioning, and reusable search panels provides configurators with tools to create intuitive interfaces matching organisational workflows.
Key Features
